topStories.description: OPEC+ warned on Sunday that damage to Middle East energy assets will have a prolonged impact on oil supply even after the Iran war ends

topStories.title: ‘We sent guns to the protesters…Kurds took them’: Trump’s explosive claim; alleges Iran ‘slaughtered’ 45,000 protesters
topStories.description: Trump alleged that the Iranian government “slaughtered” 45,000 people during recent anti-regime protests. However, no official figures have been released by Iran, with estimates from activists and reports varying widely.

topStories.title: "Tuesday. 8 pm. Eastern Time": Trump's Latest After "Hell" Warning To Iran
topStories.description: The threats followed the extraction of a US Air Force weapons systems officer whose F-15E Strike Eagle aircraft was downed inside Iran

topStories.title: BJP, Assam CM hit back after Congress alleges Himanta's wife holds three passports, vows legal action
topStories.description: Assam Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma and his wife vehemently rejected Congress's allegations regarding false passports and overseas assets.

topStories.title: OPEC+ agrees to hike oil output, warns of slow recovery after attacks
topStories.description: The rise is largely symbolic as some key members are unable to raise ​production amid the US-Israel war on Iran.

topStories.title: US Secret Service Probes Reports Of Overnight Gunfire Near White House
topStories.description: The US Secret Service said Sunday it was investigating reports of overnight gunfire near Lafayette Park, which is across the street from the White House.

topStories.title: Trump signals Iran deal before Tuesday deadline, warns ‘I am blowing up everything’ if talks fail
topStories.description: With Trump’s deadline approaching, attention is now on whether diplomacy can avert further escalation or if the situation moves toward direct US military action.

topStories.title: Weapon of mass distraction: Congress slams Govt.’s delimitation proposal
topStories.description: Jairam Ramesh says the PM is ‘hoodwinking’ people by claiming that the strength of the southern States in the Lok Sabha will not go down. Siddaramaiah says five southern States together gain barely 63-66 additional seats, while just seven BJP-dominated States gain about 128-131 seats – nearly double

topStories.description: US President Donald Trump said his deadline for Iran to open the Strait of Hormuz or face attacks on critical infrastructure is Tuesday evening, according to an interview he gave to the Wall Street...

dailyNews.title: A debate on the tenure of Election Commission-appointed police chief
dailyNews.description: However, the EC order did not specify a tenure for him. The question is whether Mr. Rathore would be entitled to a minimum two-year tenure, as mandated by the Supreme Court in the  landmark Prakash Singh case. However, this ruling applies only to appointments made through the UPSC-led process

dailyNews.title: Trump’s ticking clock: New deadline for Iran as threat of devastating strikes looms over Hormuz blockade

dailyNews.title: "Whole Region Going To Burn": Iranian Parliament Speaker's Warning To Trump
dailyNews.description: Iran's powerful parliament speaker warned US President Donald Trump on Sunday that his "reckless moves" would mean "our whole region is going to burn".

dailyNews.title: Trump immigration policies face questions after alleged abuse of child in prolonged federal custody
dailyNews.description: According to court documents cited by AP, the child was placed in foster care in Harlingen, Texas, where she said she was abused by an older child.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens ‘hell’ for Iran over Hormuz Strait as deadline approaches
dailyNews.description: US president threatens to strike power plants and bridges on Tuesday in an expletive-laden social media post.

dailyNews.title: Trinamool versus Congress battle heats up in central Bengal
dailyNews.description: It’s a prestige fight in Berhampore for former MP Adhir Ranjan Chowdhury, while former Trinamool MP Mausam Benazir Noor is returning to her Congress roots in the Malatipur contest

dailyNews.title: Mearsheimer: No signs of quick end to US-Israel war on Iran
dailyNews.description: US political scientist John Mearsheimer argues Israel, not Iran, is the Middle East country that is ‘highly aggressive’.

dailyNews.title: DR Congo to receive ‘third-country’ deportees from the US under new deal
dailyNews.description: DRC gov't says deportees will begin to arrive this month, under a 'temporary' arrangment paid for by the US.

dailyNews.title: Iran’s World Cup participation depends on relocation from US, minister says
dailyNews.description: Iran awaits FIFA's response after requesting relocation of its games to Mexico amid the US-Israeli war.

dailyNews.title: Why an attack on Bushehr nuclear plant would be catastrophic for the Gulf
dailyNews.description: The US and Israel have repeatedly hit the plant, raising risks of radioactive contamination far beyond Iran's borders.

dailyNews.title: Easter travel chaos grips US: 5,600 flights delayed, hundreds cancelled as major airports reel under pressure
dailyNews.description: As per the FlightAware data, the US airports saw as many as 5,600 and nearly 500 flight cancellations on Saturday, day after Good Friday.

dailyNews.title: Quote of the day by Franklin D. Roosevelt: ‘The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today’
dailyNews.description: This powerful line by Franklin D. Roosevelt highlights a simple but profound idea: our fears and uncertainties in the present can prevent us from achieving a better future.

dailyNews.title: Trump offers no concrete plan as Strait of Hormuz closure shocks Europe
dailyNews.description: Economist James Meadway says US President Donald Trump offers threats but no clear plan to end the crisis.

topStories.title: Middle East Conflict: US destroys two of its warplanes while rescuing pilot, Trump hails operation; Iran mocks
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump on Sunday (local time) announced that an Air Force officer was rescued in an intense and daring nighttime operation. However, he did not mention that Washington had to destroy two of its warplanes to conduct the rescue operation. Iran has mocked Washington over the damage.

dailyNews.title: Trump issues stark warning to Iran: Reopen Strait of Hormuz or face US strikes on power plants and bridges on Tuesday
dailyNews.description: In a post on Truth Social, Trump said: “Tuesday will be Power Plant Day, and Bridge Day, all wrapped up in one, in Iran… Open the Strait… or you’ll be living in Hell.”

dailyNews.title: NASA chief Jared Isaacman says Artemis II would not be possible 'if it wasn't for President Trump'
dailyNews.description: NASA administrator Jared Isaacman says Artemis II would not be at this moment without President Trump as Orion prepares to pass the far side of the Moon.

dailyNews.title: Trump admin urges restoring ballroom construction in emergency motion: 'Time is of the essence'
dailyNews.description: Trump administration files emergency motion to overturn a judge's ruling halting White House ballroom construction, citing security and safety concerns.

dailyNews.title: Inside the daring rescue of airman behind enemy lines: How CIA assisted with 'deception campaign'
dailyNews.description: U.S. military rescued a seriously wounded F-15 crew member from deep inside Iran's mountains in what Trump called an amazing show of bravery and talent.

dailyNews.title: Trump Seems Emboldened With New Threats in Truth Social Post Over Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: In an expletive-filled social media post, Mr. Trump said Iran should open the Strait of Hormuz or he will bomb bridges and power plants.

dailyNews.title: Stephen Miller Is Still Pursuing His Immigration Agenda, but More Quietly
dailyNews.description: The architect of President Trump’s mass deportation campaign wants “a moratorium on immigration from third world countries until we can heal ourselves as a nation.” The chaos in Minneapolis has not pushed him off that course.

dailyNews.title: "WE GOT HIM!," Trump declares after U.S. airman rescued deep inside Iran
dailyNews.description: As the Iran war passes the five-week mark, President Trump hailed the rescue of a U.S. airman who was missing for days inside Iran — and threatened to hit power plants if Iran doesn't let the Strait of Hormuz open.

dailyNews.title: Maryland Gov. Wes Moore: The solution to rising gas prices is to "stop fighting foreign wars"
dailyNews.description: Maryland Gov. Wes Moore criticized President Trump's handling of the Iran war on "Face the Nation." He told CBS News' Ed O'Keefe he's looking for "some clarity" about the war's goals, and warned it has driven up prices.

dailyNews.title: Tim Kaine calls on Trump to 'dial back the rhetoric' after US jet is downed in Iran: Full interview
dailyNews.description: In an interview with Meet the Press, Sen. Tim Kaine (D-Va.) reacts to the latest developments in the war with Iran as the White House asks Congress to approve a major increase to the Pentagon budget.

dailyNews.title: Exclusive: Trump reacts to ‘Easter Miracle’ rescue of downed U.S. airman
dailyNews.description: In a text message to Meet the Press moderator Kristen Welker, President Trump reacts to U.S. forces safely rescuing the second F-15E crew member of a two-seat fighter jet that went down over Iran on Friday.

dailyNews.title: Sen. Kaine skeptical Congress will pass $1.5T military budget
dailyNews.description: Sen. Tim Kaine, D-Va., expressed skepticism on “Meet the Press” Sunday about the Trump administration’s 2027 budget plan, which includes a request of $1.5 trillion from Congress to fund the Defense Department.

dailyNews.title: Trump calls rescue of F-15E airman an ‘Easter Miracle’
dailyNews.description: In a text message to “Meet the Press” moderator Kristen Welker, President Trump reacted to U.S. forces safely rescuing the second F-15E crew member of a two-seat fighter jet that went down over Iran on Friday.
